titlestmt.titleproper: Office of the Dean of Students records37-1-1384
titlestmt.author: Compiled by N. Dean et al

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-09-26 18:29:12 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Office of the Dean of Students records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Dean of Students

did.abstract: Subject files, annual reports, correspondence, surveys, and other administrative files of the Dean of Students; includes fraternity and sorority matters records.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Subject files, annual reports, correspondence, surveys, and other administrative files of the Dean of Students; includes fraternity and sorority matters records.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Office of the Dean of Students records, #37-1-1384. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

did.unittitle: Women's Student Government Association (WSGA) ms volume,
WSGA Subject Files and related items,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 21 pages, mimeograph. Part I. "Survey of Attitudes and Satisfactions of Class of '78 Graduates"
